## Checklist

### General

* [ ] The PR solves exactly one issue.
* [ ] The implementation matches the issue's acceptance criteria.
* [ ] The code builds successfully.
* [ ] New or modified functionality is covered by tests where appropriate.

### Code Review

* [ ] I reviewed my own changes.
* [ ] I removed debugging code, commented-out code, and temporary TODOs.
* [ ] Naming is clear and consistent.
* [ ] Public interfaces are documented where necessary.

### Architecture

* [ ] No unnecessary coupling between modules was introduced.
* [ ] The implementation follows the project's architecture and development rulebook.
* [ ] An ADR was created or updated if an architectural decision changed (or no ADR was required).

### Final Check

* [ ] Commit history is clean.
* [ ] This branch is ready to be merged.
